name: Neiman Marcus Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugars until smooth.
2. Add eggs and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Stir in flour, salt, baking powder, and blended oatmeal.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
5. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
